detail.description:
Block Crush: A Calm & Classic Woody Block Puzzle for Everyone

Step into Block Crush, a beautifully crafted block puzzle world built from warm wood textures and peaceful design. This soothing woody puzzle blends logic, focus, and creative play into a relaxing daily moment you can enjoy anytime.

Slide each block into place, clear lines with ease, and feel the natural rhythm of a block puzzle that’s free, satisfying, and endlessly calming.

A Relaxing Woody Block Puzzle Experience

Every move in
detail.releaseNotes: This update brings performance improvements and a smoother gameplay experience.
